title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization, not subscription models, will drive sustainable AI tool adoption. He contends that the current bottleneck for AI agents is not technological capability but the time required for humans to develop trust in AI systems.
